publicSurface.rule: unsoccer/index.html is the public static page for the local server and production route until the built client is deployed there.
UI Designer owns public page hierarchy, prototype status copy, catalog continuity, and itch.io presentation fit.
The public route must not expose a directory listing.

rules.rule: Client bundles must not import server-only code.

v0.0.002 keeps Russian player-facing text, HDR-style environment lighting, a visible sun, a 120-second realtime day cycle, an inertial perspective follow camera, and distinct server-authoritative body/left-foot/right-foot contacts.
Server owns physics, score, teams, and room assignment.
Client audio is procedural Web Audio driven by authoritative ServerState diffs, not local input prediction.
First 4 clients are players; clients 5-32 are spectators/testers.
Itch package contains static built client only.
Free3D runtime assets require local GLB files and provenance.
